---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new metric, integration, or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What problem does this solve?

Describe the use case or pain point this feature addresses.

## Proposed Solution

A clear description of what you'd like added or changed.

```python
# If applicable, sketch out what the API/usage might look like
import rubriceval as rubric

rubric.evaluate(
    test_cases=[...],
    metrics=[
        rubric.YourNewMetric(param="value"),
    ],
)
```

## Alternatives Considered

Any other approaches or workarounds you've tried.

## Would you like to implement this?

- [ ] Yes, I'd like to open a PR for this
- [ ] I'd like to discuss it first
- [ ] I'm just suggesting it — happy for someone else to pick it up

## Additional Context

Links, related issues, or references to similar implementations in other frameworks.
